heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 6987 Authorization of appropriations
text: There are authorized to be appropriated not to exceed $35,000,000 for the fiscal year 1978 to carry out the purposes of this subchapter (except for ).section 6982 of this title
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in , prior to the general amendment of the Solid Waste Disposal Act by .section 3259 of this titlePub. L. 94–580
